description:
# Cross-Instance Assignment

Enable features to flow between instances based on capacity, domain ownership, and priority. Work-stealing protocol for idle instances.

## Phases
1. Instance Capacity Advertising
2. Work-Stealing Protocol
3. Unified Dashboard View
title: [Epic] Cross-Instance Assignment
